resources.string: Tso tseg
Nrhiav tsis tau app rau nruab apk
Kev ceeb toom tsis ua haujlwm, thov rov qhib kev tso cai ceeb toom
Tsis muaj kev tso cai los nyeem cov ntaub ntawv ntaus ntawv
Tsis muaj kev tso cai los hloov kho qhov system
Tseeb
Yuav tsum tau automate tsab ntawv ua haujlwm (nias, nias ntev, los so, thiab lwm yam), yog tias tsis siv, tsuas yog cov ntawv sau uas tsis koom nrog kev ua haujlwm tsis siv neeg tuaj yeem ua tiav.
%d khiav scripts nres
Lub console
Kaw cov ntawv qhia zaub mov
Qhib cov ntawv qhia zaub mov
Yuam kev:
Tsis muaj ntaub ntawv
Tsis muaj ntaub ntawv nyeem thiab sau ntawv tso cai
Tsis tso cai qhov rai ntab
Tsis muaj ntawv sau
Txoj kev yog khoob
Tsab ntawv no yuav tsum tau Auto.js version naj npawb %d lossis siab dua los khiav
Tsab ntawv no yuav tsum muaj qhov Android version ua haujlwm:
Kev saib xyuas taw qhia tsis tau qhib, thov qhib nws hauv software nqis
Kev saib xyuas tseem ceeb tsis tau qhib, thov qhib nws hauv qhov chaw software
Pib ua haujlwm
